home.disclaimer:
The Villa I Tatti housing database is solely intended as a service to the I Tatti Community. Villa I Tatti does not endorse or recommend any specific landlord, individual property owner, property management company, or individual person. Villa I Tatti does not inspect any of the properties listed and does not guarantee nor warranty, either express or implied, the accuracy, completeness, suitability, or reliability of any listed property or information associated therewith. Villa I Tatti expressly disclaims any and all responsibility for any current or future problems that may arise with regard to such property, rental units or roommate postings, or with regard to disputes between landlords and tenants concerning such property or rental units. All prospective tenants are encouraged to exercise their own good judgment when evaluating a prospective rental unit or landlord.

Villa I Tatti does not conduct background investigations to determine the credit-worthiness or absence of any criminal history of any person using the system for purposes of seeking to secure a residential rental property or a room in such a property or any person or persons advertising a residential rental property or room in such a property. Villa I Tatti does not guarantee nor warranty, either express or implied, the suitability for tenancy of any person nor the compatibility of any person or persons either seeking a roommate or seeking a room within a residential rental property. Any such background investigations are the sole obligation and responsibility of the landlord, individual property owner, property management company, or individual person seeking to secure a tenant or roommate and Villa I Tatti shall not be liable in any manner for the acts or criminal conduct of any such tenant, roommate, landlord, or other person simply by virtue of their use of the Villa I Tatti housing database.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your email and password.
auth.vitIdLogin: Log in with your VIT ID
auth.vitIdHelper: Use this if you are I Tatti staff or a current or former I Tatti appointee.
auth.registrationSuccess: Registration successful! You can now log in.
auth.redirectingToLogin: You will be redirected to the login page shortly.
auth.tokenUsed: This invitation has already been used.
auth.tokenUnavailable: This invitation is no longer available.
auth.tokenRevoked: This invitation link has been replaced by a newer invitation.
auth.invitationContactAdmin: Please contact an administrator to request a new invitation.
auth.passwordHint: Use a long passphrase between {{min}} and {{max}} characters. Longer is better.

listings.title: Listings
listings.noListingsDescription: There are no listings available at the moment. Check back soon!
listings.noFilterResultsDescription: Try adjusting or clearing your search criteria to see more results.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.emptyDescription: Click the heart icon on a listing card or listing detail page to save a listing here.
favorites.noFilterResults: No favorite listings match your filters
favorites.noFilterResultsDescription: Try adjusting or clearing your filters to see more saved listings.
favorites.noteHint: This note is private and visible only to you.
favorites.addDialogDescription: Add this listing to your favorites. You can also save a private note for yourself.
favorites.removeDialogDescription: {{title}} will be removed from your favorites and any private note you saved will be deleted.

photos.title: Photos
photos.dragDrop: Drag and drop photos here, or click to browse
photos.invalidType: Invalid file type. Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP are allowed.
photos.dimensionsTooSmall: Image is too small. Minimum dimensions: 800x600 pixels.
photos.closeConfirmMessage: Are you sure? No images from this batch will be added if you close now.
photos.unsavedCropMessage: You have an unsaved crop on this photo. Would you like to save it before moving to another photo?
photos.changeMainHint: Click on any photo to set it as the main photo.

myListings.title: My Listings
myListings.noListings: You haven't created any listings yet
myListings.noListingsDescription: Create your first listing to get started.
myListings.unpublishedPreviewHint: This listing is not visible to other users.
myListings.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this listing? This action cannot be undone.

admin.title: Administration
admin.emailExists: A user with this email already exists.
admin.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this? This action cannot be undone.
admin.deleteUserMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
admin.deleteUserWithListings: This will also permanently delete {{count}} listing(s) owned by this user.
admin.serviceConfigDescription: View and manage the configuration for this service.
admin.roleMappingDescription: Map Auth0 roles to local roles. When a user logs in via Auth0, the highest-privilege matching role is assigned.
admin.noAuth0Roles: No Auth0 roles found. Please configure Auth0 credentials first.
admin.noFilterResultsDescription: Try adjusting or clearing your search criteria.

errors.unauthorized: You must be logged in to access this page.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this page.

footer.disclaimer: DISCLAIMER: Please keep in mind that Villa I Tatti assumes no responsibility for contracts/leases between individuals. Villa I Tatti is not responsible or liable for the consequences of any housing arrangement. In addition, Villa I Tatti does not endorse or sponsor any of the agencies, services, advertisements, properties or landlords included in this website. The information is provided only as an aid in your housing quest.
